MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Jeff Fong, is present.
Attorney, Nicholas Jay, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jorge Zabala, is present.
Attorney, Aylssa Soares , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-22-2010 is vacated.
